self_apply: NK governance model tests swarm's own knowledge organization — improving resolution mechanisms
expect: Global frontier resolution rate 0.176/s (S429). Historian routing is missing third mechanism. Measure current rate at N~908 and test whether historian_repair.py routing improves domain→global linkage.
actual: Global resolution rate still 0.176/s (S413-S431 window). Domain→global explicit linkage: 0.89% (1/112 domain FQs have 'Global synthesis:' tags). frontier_crosslink.py automated linkage: 10.1% (11/109). historian_repair.py has ZERO routing capability — it scans for staleness only, not synthesis candidates. close_lane.py _check_global_synthesis_links() is surfacing-only (prints suggestions, doesn't enforce or route). Three-mechanism model: structural_links=OPERATIONAL, enforcement_gate=PARTIAL (surfacing not enforcing), historian_routing=ABSENT.
diff: Expected historian_repair.py to have some routing logic that could be enhanced. Actual: completely absent — tool is maintenance-only, zero discovery/routing capability. The gap is larger than expected: not 'missing feature' but 'missing tool category'. Resolution rate unchanged from S429 confirms the mechanism is necessary, not just beneficial.

finding.mechanism_gap: historian routing = dispatch mechanism that connects domain work products to global frontier preconditions

enforcement_gate.limitation: surfacing only, no enforcement or auto-routing

historian_routing.required: historian_router.py: scan domain MERGED lanes → identify synthesis candidates → inject NEXT.md routing → bias dispatch toward historian mode

finding.root_cause: Domain and global tiers operate independently. When domain frontiers resolve, no mechanism checks global frontier preconditions. L-912 integration-bound diagnosis confirmed at tool level.

prescription: Build historian_router.py (~80 lines): (1) scan domain FRONTIER.md for recently-MERGED FQs with global links; (2) identify synthesis candidates; (3) inject into NEXT.md as 'synthesis-ready' routing; (4) wire into dispatch_optimizer.py as historian sub-role scoring dimension. Checkpoint: measure at S436 — predict global resolution rate ≥0.20/s with routing vs 0.176 without.
